title: NewsPulse AI articles.json
description: The data contract between the curator agent (write) and the static reader (read).

id.description: Stable unique id; used in the static article page URL.

summary.description: Short summary generated by the agent at publish time.

topic.description: 'Latest' or the topic prompt used to find the article.

publishedDate.description: Original publication date of the article (YYYY-MM-DD).

addedDate.description: When the curator published it via the agent (YYYY-MM-DD).
